title: Why is the date next to a pulse struckthrough?
excerpt: For some reason random strikethroughs are appearing on my pulse dates column. Any idea why? If I change the date the strikethrough remains.

posts.author: kenevans (Kenneth Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: For some reason random strikethroughs are appearing on my pulse dates column. Any idea why? If I change the date the strikethrough remains.

posts.author: Kacey-monday.com (Kacey )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kenevans - welcome to the monday.com community!

Dates that are struck through are tied to a Status column in what’s known as “deadline mode”. So if that date column is attached to a Status column, and that Status column is marked either as “done”, (or any other status that has been programmed in that column to mean “done”), then it will strike through the date.

You can read more about Deadline Mode by clicking here.

Deadline Mode plays a big part in your use of My Week, which is where everything really comes together. More details on that here.

Let me know if you have any questions!
